Title: Filter account portfolio

Milestone: Accounts parity port from ops-dashboard

As a account manager
I want filter controls across the account portfolio
So that I can narrow the view to the accounts that need attention

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] The accounts workspace exposes shared filter state for search and account filters.
- [ ] A reset path restores the default filter state.

Notes: Filter surfaces are implemented, but I did not run behavioral QA across all combinations.
